---
title: "nitrix.geometry"
generated: true
signature-hash: 21cd0e5fa6010a4c
description: "Geometric primitives for neuroimaging."
listing:
  id: nitrix-geometry-symbols
  contents: "nitrix-geometry/*.qmd"
  type: table
  fields: [title, description]
  sort: "title"
  filter-ui: false
  page-size: 500
---

::: {.callout-important title="Generated reference stub â€” fill me"}
Auto-generated scaffold for `nitrix.geometry`. Fill the prose *outside* the
generated markers; do **not** ship as-is (SPEC Â§6.5). `check_reference_staleness.py` flags signature drift.
:::

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:__module__ -->
Geometric primitives for neuroimaging.

This subpackage collects the differentiable geometry primitives that
underpin spatial registration, resampling, and surface/mesh analysis. It
spans both regular-grid (voxel/volume) and mesh/graph representations of
spatial data.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen sections:__module__ -->
### Submodules

- `grid` -- regular-grid deformable-registration primitives:
  [`identity_grid`](nitrix-geometry-grid/identity_grid.qmd), [`spatial_transform`](nitrix-geometry-grid/spatial_transform.qmd),
  [`integrate_velocity_field`](nitrix-geometry-grid/integrate_velocity_field.qmd), [`resample`](nitrix-geometry-grid/resample.qmd), and
  [`center_of_mass_grid`](nitrix-geometry-grid/center_of_mass_grid.qmd). [`resample`](nitrix-geometry-grid/resample.qmd) and
  [`spatial_transform`](nitrix-geometry-grid/spatial_transform.qmd) dispatch over an [`Interpolator`](nitrix-geometry-grid/Interpolator.qmd) kernel
  ([`Linear`](nitrix-geometry-grid/Linear.qmd) default, [`NearestNeighbour`](nitrix-geometry-grid/NearestNeighbour.qmd), [`Lanczos`](nitrix-geometry-grid/Lanczos.qmd),
  [`CubicBSpline`](nitrix-geometry-grid/CubicBSpline.qmd), [`CatmullRomCubic`](nitrix-geometry-grid/CatmullRomCubic.qmd), [`MultiLabel`](nitrix-geometry-grid/MultiLabel.qmd)).
- `sphere` -- 2-sphere **mesh** primitives: coordinate conversions,
  geodesic distance, and [`spherical_conv`](nitrix-geometry-sphere/spherical_conv.qmd) re-backed on the sparse
  semiring matmul for $O(n \cdot k)$ cost (with $n$ vertices
  and $k$ neighbours) instead of $O(n^2)$.
- `sphere_grid` -- 2-sphere **regular-grid** topology helpers
  (parameterised equirectangular sphere): [`sphere_grid_pad_2d`](nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_pad_2d.qmd) and
  [`sphere_grid_unpad_2d`](nitrix-geometry-sphere_grid/sphere_grid_unpad_2d.qmd) with pole-flip and longitudinal-wrap
  padding. Distinct from `sphere` because the parameterised-grid case
  and the mesh case have different storage and adjacency models.
- `coords` -- coordinate utilities: [`center_of_mass_points`](nitrix-geometry-coords/center_of_mass_points.qmd),
  the displacement-from-reference helpers, and
  [`compactness_penalty`](nitrix-geometry-coords/compactness_penalty.qmd).
- `transform` -- the Lie-group chart ([`rigid_exp`](nitrix-geometry-transform/rigid_exp.qmd) /
  [`affine_exp`](nitrix-geometry-transform/affine_exp.qmd)) together with [`apply_affine`](nitrix-geometry-transform/apply_affine.qmd) and
  [`affine_grid`](nitrix-geometry-transform/affine_grid.qmd).
- `affine` -- the geometric-parameter affine algebra (Euler-angle /
  scale / shear $T R S E$ compose / decompose) and the closed-form
  least-squares [`fit_affine`](nitrix-geometry-affine/fit_affine.qmd) between point sets; complementary to
  the `transform` exponential chart.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen dims:__page__ -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `*batch` | leading batch axes (variadic) |
| `3` | *(undocumented â€” add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `m` | rows of a multi-row contrast |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

## Symbols

::: {#nitrix-geometry-symbols}
:::
